Andy Elliott on Making $715k as a Car Sa.summary: Andy Elliott went from a broken home and barely graduating high school to earning $715k as a car salesman. He shares how he discovered sales, built extreme discipline, grew a massive sales training business, and why he believes the school system fails to prepare young people for real-world success.

Justin Waller on Business, Moving Out of.summary: Justin Waller, founder of Red Iron Construction, shares his journey from poverty in south Louisiana to building an eight-figure business. He breaks down why leaving your hometown matters, how ruthless focus drives success, the importance of your environment, and his candid take on dating and relationships.

He Made $360K at 23… Then Built the #1 V.summary: Renji Bijoy made $360k at 23 before founding Immersed — the world's most-used AR/VR app, enabling people to work in fully virtual offices with a headset. He discusses his path into tech entrepreneurship, why VR is the future of remote work, and the lessons he learned scaling a startup in Austin.
